snapshot.method: read-only local Git posture plus authenticated GitHub repository metadata and selected current repository contracts

nodes.role: discovery, normalization, scoring, lifecycle, and candidate projections
public-safe radar schema, fixtures, and reports
private canonical bookmark imports, overlays, and declassification inputs
public-safe bookmark catalog and generated projection
reviewed third-party Skill governance, release graph, provenance, and abstract topology
private Codex policy, memory, projection, verification, and rollback carrier
private Claude configuration, commands, Hooks, memory, and restore carrier
non-authoritative principally temporary calibration workspace linked to ASSETS
intended final carrier for separately admitted project standards

owns: headless local application and versioned local schemas
user policy, profiles, experiments, runtime observations, transaction journals, backup receipts, and rollback
host-adapter contracts and replaceable TUI, CLI, JSON, and later GUI projections
offline caches derived from pinned governance and observed runtime evidence
doesNotOwn: curated Skill admission, provenance, release inventory, or abstract release topology
radar discovery truth, bookmark source truth, or MERIDIAN hub authority
official, runtime, Plugin, App, MCP, project, user, or Agent-owned capabilities until explicit reversible opt-in
credentials, external accounts, product accounts, native memory, or project hard-standard admission

mustRemainLocalOrPrivate: experiments containing private prompts or outputs

versionAndRelease.managerApplication: independent semantic version after stack and repository acceptance
versionAndRelease.localSchema: explicit schema version plus forward and rollback migration tests
versionAndRelease.curatedConsumption: exact commit and manifest digest; no floating main dependency
versionAndRelease.adapterContracts: independently versioned compatibility declarations with host-specific evidence
versionAndRelease.topologySnapshot: dated evidence; never permanent live truth

managerRepositoryOwns: artifact signing or attestations if later selected
curatedRepositoryOwns: curated manifest, topology, provenance, routing, and admission verification
radarRepositoriesOwn: discovery, projection, public-safe output, and freshness checks
hubOwns: public topology, navigation, and public-safe boundary validation
forbiddenInitialEdges: Manager CI reading private user-config repositories

acceptanceResponsibility.localTransactionOwner: Manager user for the bound target
acceptanceResponsibility.releaseOwner: future Manager repository owner after repository and stack acceptance

rollbackAndRetirement.localRollback: per-target lock, backup, crash-consistent journal, post-rollback verification, and residue check
rollbackAndRetirement.releaseRollback: retain prior compatible Manager and pinned curated release; withdraw only through a reviewed release event
rollbackAndRetirement.topologyRollback: remove navigation and active-consumer edges while retaining dated lineage and migration guidance
rollbackAndRetirement.retirementCondition: retire or merge the repository if the headless application boundary does not justify independent release, security, migration, and maintenance ownership
rollbackAndRetirement.retirementDestination: return reusable governance contracts to owning repositories, export user-owned local state, and never strand live managed projections

requiredFutureCrossRepositoryUpdates: YIYUAN-MERIDIAN repository map, system topology, roadmap, decision point, and verifier
agent-skills-curated consumer/interface documentation only where the accepted edge requires it
resource-radar consumer projection contract only if direct non-executable Manager metadata is accepted
public configuration templates only after a generic public-safe Manager integration pattern exists
private consumer repositories only through separate local transaction plans
observedDrift: the public YIYUAN-MERIDIAN README still describes the older selected Skills MVP pause-and-observe snapshot and has no Manager node
the local resource-radar checkout and GitHub main are different revisions and the local branch has no configured tracking relationship
the local agent-skills-curated checkout is ahead of its GitHub main and contains the uncommitted design transaction
the local codex-user-config checkout is ahead of GitHub main and contains an unrelated untracked .tmp directory
several topology nodes have no local checkout, so their GitHub metadata and current contracts are the available read-only evidence
ownerDecisionRequired: accept the recommended Rust, Ratatui, and later Tauri stack or authorize a bounded Rust-versus-Go prototype comparison
authorize the exact cross-repository documentation transactions, if any
authorize repository creation and the first implementation slice separately
verification: all referenced evidence paths in the current repository exist
every executable edge names its authority and verification requirements
candidate and observation edges remain non-executable
repository creation and product implementation remain false until a later owner event
current repository verifier and diff checks pass
